detected_usb_device.product: DAS JDS Application Kit TC397 V1.0

notes: Linux bus/device numbers are not stable and may change after unplug/replug or WSL restart.
winIDEA/DAS should discover this JDS by vendor/product and serial, so the workspace intentionally uses IFX_DAS with automatic USB selection.
The JDS COM interface is the serial port and should not be used as the debug/programming interface.
